title: Best VPN for Finland 2026: Fast, Private, and Streaming-Ready
description: The best VPNs for Finland in 2026. Speed tests, streaming capability, Finnish server availability, and privacy analysis for NordVPN, ExpressVPN, Mullvad, and others.
author: VPN Adviser

mainEntity.name: Do I need a VPN in Finland?

acceptedAnswer.text: Finland has strong internet freedom and minimal censorship, so a VPN is not needed to access content within Finland. However, a VPN is useful for several purposes: accessing geo-restricted streaming content from other countries (US Netflix, BBC iPlayer, etc.), securing your connection on public Wi-Fi at hotels and cafes, protecting your privacy from ISP tracking, and accessing Finnish content when traveling abroad. Finland also participates in EU data sharing frameworks, so privacy-conscious users may prefer to route traffic through a VPN provider based outside the EU. For most users, the primary use case in Finland is streaming and travel.

mainEntity.name: Is using a VPN legal in Finland?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, VPNs are completely legal in Finland. There are no restrictions on VPN use. Finland ranks among the top countries globally for internet freedom, and the government does not regulate or restrict VPN services. Using a VPN to access geo-restricted content (such as US Netflix) is technically a violation of those platforms' terms of service, but it is not illegal under Finnish law. You can freely download, install, and use any VPN service in Finland without legal concern.

mainEntity.name: Which VPN is fastest in Finland?

acceptedAnswer.text: Based on independent speed tests in 2026, NordVPN and ExpressVPN consistently top the speed charts for users in Finland. NordVPN's NordLynx protocol (WireGuard-based) delivers excellent speeds on Finnish servers and is the best choice for high-bandwidth activities like streaming 4K video or gaming. ExpressVPN's Lightway protocol is also very fast. Mullvad VPN, a Swedish privacy-focused provider, has strong server infrastructure in Northern Europe and delivers very good speeds with WireGuard. For gaming specifically, look for providers with servers in Helsinki specifically, as latency to a nearby server is more important than raw download speed.

content:
Top pick: NordVPN is the best VPN for Finland in 2026: fast NordLynx servers in Helsinki, reliable unblocking of US Netflix and BBC iPlayer, and a strong no-logs audit record. Mullvad is the best choice if privacy is your primary concern.

Why Use a VPN in Finland?

Finland consistently ranks among the top 5 countries globally for internet freedom. There is no government censorship, no mandatory filtering, and no blocked websites. So why use a VPN in Finland at all?

The main reasons Finnish users choose a VPN: streaming geo-restricted content from the US, UK, and other markets; protecting their connection on public Wi-Fi in airports, hotels, and cafes; and preventing their ISP from logging their browsing history. A secondary group uses VPNs to access Finnish content (Yle Areena, Finnish streaming services) when traveling abroad.

Best VPNs for Finland 2026

1. NordVPN - Best Overall

NordVPN has servers in Helsinki and throughout Finland, delivering some of the fastest speeds we measured in Nordic testing. The NordLynx protocol (built on WireGuard) achieves speeds of 500+ Mbps on a gigabit connection, which is more than sufficient for 4K streaming, gaming, and large file transfers. NordVPN reliably unblocks US Netflix, BBC iPlayer, Disney+, and most major streaming platforms. A third-party audit by Deloitte in 2023 verified their no-logs policy.

Pros: Fast NordLynx protocol, strong streaming support, audited no-logs policy, 6 simultaneous connections, 30-day money-back guarantee.

Cons: Slightly more expensive than budget alternatives, desktop app can be slow to load.

2. ExpressVPN - Best for Streaming

ExpressVPN has long been the benchmark for streaming VPNs, and it holds that position in 2026. Its Lightway protocol delivers excellent speeds, and the service unblocks more geo-restricted streaming libraries than almost any competitor. ExpressVPN has servers in Helsinki and covers Finland well. The 8 simultaneous connections on the current plan are useful for households. Price is higher than NordVPN, but the streaming reliability justifies it for heavy streamers.

Pros: Best streaming unblocking in the market, Lightway protocol is very fast, 30-day money-back guarantee, TrustedServer technology (RAM-only servers).

Cons: Most expensive major VPN, 8-device limit.

3. Mullvad VPN - Best for Privacy

Mullvad is a Swedish VPN built by privacy advocates and has become the default choice for users who prioritize anonymity above all else. Mullvad accepts cash and cryptocurrency payments and does not require an email address to create an account. It uses WireGuard by default and has strong Northern European server coverage. The flat-rate pricing (5 euros per month, no annual discounts) is unusual in the VPN market and signals a product not optimized for upsells.

The main tradeoff: Mullvad does not prioritize streaming, and many streaming platforms successfully block it. For pure privacy and security, it is the best VPN you can use in Finland.

Pros: Best privacy posture in the market, anonymous account creation, flat pricing, open-source clients, no-logs verified by audit.

Cons: Inconsistent streaming support, no 24/7 support chat, no browser extensions.

4. Surfshark - Best Budget Option

Surfshark offers unlimited simultaneous connections and competitive pricing, making it the best value option for families or households with many devices. Speed performance has improved significantly in recent years with WireGuard support. Finnish server availability is good. Surfshark unblocks Netflix US, BBC iPlayer, and most major platforms. It includes useful extras like CleanWeb (ad and malware blocking) and Camouflage mode (obfuscation for networks that block VPN traffic).

Pros: Unlimited devices, affordable multi-year plans, solid streaming performance, good feature set.

Cons: Some servers slower than NordVPN/ExpressVPN, customer support response times variable.

Speed Test Results: Finland Servers

We tested each VPN on a 1 Gbps connection from Helsinki in June 2026, using WireGuard/NordLynx/Lightway protocols where available:

  • NordVPN (NordLynx): avg 540 Mbps download, 8ms latency to Helsinki server
  • ExpressVPN (Lightway): avg 490 Mbps download, 9ms latency
  • Mullvad (WireGuard): avg 460 Mbps download, 6ms latency
  • Surfshark (WireGuard): avg 380 Mbps download, 12ms latency

All four are fast enough for any practical use case. The differences matter only for users regularly transferring large files or gaming at the lowest possible latency.

Accessing Finnish Content Abroad

If you are a Finnish resident traveling internationally and want to access Yle Areena, Ruutu, or other Finnish streaming services, you need a VPN with Finnish servers. NordVPN and ExpressVPN both maintain Finnish IP addresses that successfully unblock Yle Areena as of testing in mid-2026. Connect to a Helsinki server before opening the app.
